name: EaTR: Event-aware Transformer for Video Grounding
local_changes: Package-relative imports and isolated module layout.
Paper-style max-pool/two-layer-MLP GMR existence adapter on final moment queries.
Soccer-GMR feature dataset with video extension stripping.
MR-only, per-sample null-safe Hungarian matching and zero-safe losses.
Repository official Soccer-GMR evaluator integration and modern train/evaluate CLIs.

Unified quality, DualGround, hierarchical-counter, and HieA2M variants with step-zero parent preservation; the local DualGround masks only its residual so padded parent tokens remain bitwise unchanged.
Full primary decoding, adaptive diagnostics, Count metrics, and checkpoint structure detection.
